title: gardenia jasminoides var. maruba
intro: Gardenia jasminoides var. maruba, also known as the 'Maruba' gardenia, is a variety of the evergreen flowering plant Gardenia jasminoides, native to China and Japan, characterized by its showy white flowers and glossy green leaves. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. Consuming the plant is said to provide various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Gardenia jasminoides var. maruba is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its purported ability to balance the body's 'yin' and 'yang' energies.
